Lightweight

Lightweight (150-161.9 lbs) fighter ranks

The rankings presented are computerized and provided by the FightMatrix ranking system, which utilizes a comprehensive MMA fight database to provide objective rankings. Please note, that these rankings ONLY contain fighters who have had at least one professional fight some time in the 450 days prior to the ranking date.

Issue Date: 5/10/2026 (Official Release: #1023)
Rating Formula:

7 thoughts on “Lightweight”

  1. h says:
    March 16, 2026 at 8:46 pm

    Sorry, recapping since it looks like double-commenting replaces the old comment:

    Jeremy Stephens went from 281 to 1466 lightweight without fighting, what’s up with that?

    Reply
  2. h says:
    March 16, 2026 at 8:44 pm

    Sorry I didn’t mean unranked because it hasn’t been that long since his last fight, but going from 281 to last place without fighting is strange

    Reply
  3. h says:
    March 16, 2026 at 8:40 pm

    Jeremy Stephens #1466 lightweight: bug? He was #281 in the January quarterly ranking. He should be unranked for inactivity, not at last place

    Reply
  4. alex says:
    November 16, 2025 at 9:36 am

    where is tsarukyan

    Reply
    1. Oleg says:
      November 16, 2025 at 10:33 pm

      Inactive

      Reply
  5. Daniel Cerón Escudero says:
    December 22, 2024 at 10:17 pm

    Me gustaría reseñar que teneis puesto a joel alvarez (top 15 de la división del peso ligero de la ufc) con la bandera de Portugal cuando el es Español, asique me gustaría que arreglarais eso, un saludo

    Reply
    1. Oleg says:
      December 23, 2024 at 11:08 am

      Gracias, lo arreglaré.

      Reply
